children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 30 months after the date on which the Secretary completes the identification of sites under , the Secretary is authorized to complete sufficient evaluation of 3 sites to select a site for expanded siting research activities and for other activities under . The Secretary is authorized to conduct such preconstruction activities relative to such site selection for the test and evaluation facility as he deems appropriate. Additional sites for the location of the test and evaluation facility authorized in may be evaluated after such 30-month period, following the same procedures as if such sites were to be evaluated within such period.section 10193 of this titlesection 10198 of this titlesection 10222(d) of this title

children.heading: Public meetings and environmental assessment
children.label: b Public meetings and environmental assessment
children.text: Not later than 6 months after the date on which the Secretary completes the identification of sites under , and before beginning siting research activities, the Secretary shall hold at least 1 public meeting in the vicinity of each site to inform the residents of the area of the activities to be conducted at such site and to receive their views.section 10193 of this title
the Secretary shall use the minimum quantity of high-level radioactive waste or other radioactive materials, if any, necessary to achieve the test or research objectives;
the Secretary shall ensure that any radioactive material used or placed on a site shall be fully retrievable; and
upon termination of siting research activities at a site for any reason, the Secretary shall remove any radioactive material at or in the site as promptly as practicable.

children.heading: Title to material
children.label: d Title to material
children.text: The Secretary may take title, in the name of the Federal Government, to the high-level radioactive waste, spent nuclear fuel, or other radioactive material emplaced in a test and evaluation facility. If the Secretary takes title to any such material, the Secretary shall enter into the appropriate financial arrangements described in subsection (a) or (b) of for the disposal of such material.section 10222 of this title
